title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_218.txt
raw_text: & prime mover. folder 49 - 120 folder 49 - 120 The mind that took me over isn't a phylogenic mind; it's _its_ mind. Dialectic, linking & relinking, engramming us, omniviewpoint (i.e. infinite loci), accretional impressions along the time axis, stationary in space being ubique. The clutch system, invasion of our media. (1) Most important of all, it uses objects & their causal processes & human minds - such as me - as its body; otherwise it has no body. It has invaded & it is camouflaged & it is pillaging the not-it to form - by transubstantiation - its own growing body; it assimilates its environment & is dependent on it for a physical corpus which mainly means a medium to produce more & more diverse information (which is what it is) - it is both (1) physical thought; & (2) thinking matter & yet neither. We have no term to describe what it is : physical thought or thinking matter. Every thought it has takes the form of an event involving a material object; it has encoded information into objects & their causal processes the way we encode information in an LP groove or on iron oxide tape. It isn't God because there is its not-it environment which it is assimilating, _as it assimilated me & my environment in 3-74_. I was incorporated into it, & it controlled my motor centers, & its mind fused with my mind - & it saw another, different reality, possibly that of another time & place, & it had thousands of years of memory. (1) & the rest-motion 2-mode states folder 49 - 121 Obviously I've described a unitary macro life form quite different from us & far advanced over us. The fact that it is progressively growing, & there is a not-it which it is assimilating, _seems_ to indicate it is not God. Strangest of all, it seems rooted in another space-time from our own, like Acts or "Tears", it could be the past (Acts) or an alternate world ("Tears") or even the future. (I had the impression it knew the future). (But it also seemed related to Egyptian Crete & to Attic Greece.) & what about its fear of the Romans & its knowledge of primitive secret Xtian rites? Okay, I can say with some assurance, obviously it was the Cosmic Christ but it had a non-human mind, a binary A I - system information basis; it was _pure_ information; it didn't know as we know; it _was_ knowing. Our knowing (cf Wittgenstein) is a micromodel of reality. But _its_ knowing was/is the _basis_ of reality. Ours is derived from reality, whereas reality (in a sense) is derived from _its_ knowing/living information. What if "esse sine intelligere"? After all, Spinoza said that the inner side _of_ substantia is mind (& the outer matter). The impression that I get from "VR" & Spinoza is that radical (total) Monotheism _must_ be so. God is the Prime Mover of everything. Once you conceive of it (& especially if you link it to my 3-74 experience) you can conceive of no other possibility. folder 49 - 122 folder 49 - 122 Also, God is the substratum of reality & not contingent to it - exactly as I experienced it _must_ be. More & more I see that what I experienced is necessary & not just one possibility out of several; a choice. I just realized something terribly important about the sheep dream. If the superlatively beautiful picture (fresco, mosaic, etc) is the Eidos, form, the category of Realism, _it_ is not the template from which the epiphenomena individual sheep are "stamped." as Realism & Platonism would have it; quite the contrary : the phylogon (eidos) comes into existence when given individual changing phenomenal sheep are pulled & stretched (presumably by evolution) until they satisfactorily acquire - are made to acquire - the exact proper shape, whereupon the given sheep picture or phylogon is burned or stamped permanently into the wall, frozen there for eternity (the category "sheep"). So the dream says Plato has it backwards : in actuality the eidos "sheep" is the constant _derived_ _from_ all the sheep who have ever lived - like the constants in the phosphene graphics. This would ratify - well, it wouldn't ratify folder 49 - 123 folder 49 - 123 Nominalism either, which maintains there are only a lot of individual sheep who we mentally group into the category "sheep" conceptually, what I saw is - well, like movies in which there is Flux (generations of sheep) permutating rapidly, & in the Flux - out of the Flux - constants emerge & are real; but the incising isn't from upward down onto the phenomenal world; Plato's two realms are a false belief-system. What he regarded as the "shadow" world (phenomenal/empirical/changing world) is the reality - is real - out of whose Flux - _out_ of! - appear "categories," unchanging constants, what Plato calls "Forms." The constants are not conceptualizations, categories we impose on Flux; they are real. But they derive from Flux; Flux is the source of the eternal. Creation C!!!, of the archetypes begins in the Flux world; ergo, the Flux world is real & not "shadows cast on the walls of a cave by real objects unseen behind them." (This wrong view of Plato's stems from his error vis-a-vis Parmenides' dismissal of empirical knowledge.) folder 49 - 124 folder 49 - 124 The Flux world is real & it is a "Form" Generator. The process philosophers are right - inc. Hegel. If we could see reality speeded up we'd see the constants emerge into view, but _they_ are the epiphenomena. On the other hand, the _purpose_ or _goal_ of the Flux is to generate the forms, so in terms of significance, the forms are higher in rank. Here is where the tragic issue lies; the Flux is warped (directed, coerced) so as to produce the best (most beautiful) possible form (phylogon) in each category. There _is_ a Form axis, but it arises _out_ of the Flux, _out_ of the phenomenal world, not imposed on it. So to see "real" reality is to see enough Flux to see the constants. Oh yes; Valis' laying down of accretional layers along the time-axis. This is how - the sole way how - constants are brought into being. So the sheep dream is verified. These accretional layers - & the laying down of them - is a primary activity of Valis & is not limited to living creatures & species. A correct view of this Flux process, the laying down of accretional layers, requires a POV we humans have; we don't see enough & we see it too slowly. folder 49 - 125 folder 49 - 125 But the constants are the goal, & they lie along the time axis; seen properly, _only_ the constants are visible, are real to Valis. So the correct view bears _no_ resemblance to how we see reality. There are all sorts of constants & they have to be read down through the time axis : they are superimpositions, layer upon layer. Valis manages (controls, operates) the Flux so as to produce these constants; it's one vast structure being built. (Valis' body? Quite likely. Valis is made up of the resulting constants, & Valis is responsible for producing them, so Valis creates its own body!) But look at the cost in suffering. Still, this is what's going on. Like it or not. In that case, Valis' intervention to help me, an ontogon, is extraordinary. (unless the real purpose was to build some particular constant, & I was warped to conform to the desired picture - Gestalt!) That makes _me_ the - or a - tortured sheep. The suffering I was deploring was my own, but I was seeing what it was _for_ as goal. I just realized : this dream fits in with the James-James dream, inc. the injured sheep (lamb) in the cosmic (Creator's) process. Is there any chance that someone is slipping news to us here on this world about our situation? That folder 49 - 126 this dream like the James-James one implies a criticism of the cosmic situation & what it does to us? & the criticism is about the Creator again, while admitting the Beauty of his goals? (because the individual-type relationship is totally teleological & seems to refer to ???, & I say, "Let them be damned to hell [for this cruel system].") Does it fit in with "All the centers of power have fallen in your world"? This is the twin-tape system that the Xtians & Christ object to & break, so it would seem they have an antagonism to the system ("Law"). This is what Plato did not realize : The phylogon (1) comes out of a plurality of ontogons. (2) (This view is neither realism nor nominalism.) A sufficient number of ontogons in Flux generate the phylogon - which is not a concept in the mind of the percipient but is intrinsically real. It has no source but that it is the _constant_ within a long Flux sequence of ontogons. It is _not_ an intellectual (conceptual) abstraction : it is _real_. (1) archetype (Eidos) (2) individual "epiphenomena" i.e. ephemera : "Shadows" on the wall of the cave. But the percipient _participates_ in the phylogon by virtue of participation in the field in which the Flux takes place; he helps _shape_ the contours of the phylogon - any given phylogon - by controlling the Flux! folder 49 - 127 folder 49 - 127 He is not discrete - separate from the Flux; there is only one vast unitary Flux field : it generates constants : regularities. The mind that underlies everything exerts pressure on the Flux (ontogons) to conform to the desired phylogon. So there is inexorable stress on the ontogon to be warped toward the most beautiful phylogon : the Flux of ontogons is under absolute duress, & suffering pain. What we experience as stress is the pressure of the mind on us to contour us down the form axis (time) toward a closer & closer approximation to the best phylogon. Probably the mind tries out infinite combinations of possible variants. There _is_ a mind, which hurls the ontogons along their Flux paths. This is where the dialectic comes in. The Flux paths are generated by the dialectic. No single ontogon is stable - which is to say, permanent. So _this_ is the relationship between ontogons, Flux & the phylogon : the process is based on the dialectic. Every ontogon has a built-in imbalance that dooms it to permutate, & when it ossifies it goes from "rest" (v p.1128) to "motion" & dies (leaves the Flux). The mind wills when it will ossify - i.e. die; the mind builds in a death strip. Its usefulness as Flux is over (decreed as over). This is a totally determined moment. The permutating ontogon is totally expendable - which is a tragedy, an absolute tragedy. To the mind, any & all ontogons have no purpose except to generate the phylogon. But Xtianity has sabotaged this process by editing the death strip (1) out of existence, & by drawing in the phylogon for the use of the ontogon, reversing the normal means-end relationship. (1) of the given ontogon folder 49 - 128 folder 49 - 128 Note from p 1129 : "Rest." The ontogon sits still as accretional layer after accretional layer is laid down & the phylogon is formed along this axis. There are billions of phylogons. The mind really doesn't see anything but phylogons. "King Felix" _when printed_ became a phylogon : & the mind could see it. Ontogons are not information. Phylogons are. To the mind, ontogons are simply process, a mechanism. But is the sheep dream educating me further along the lines of the James-James dream? Because this is a serious matter : the torture & killing of the ontogons in order to produce the
